description: Style Note Trust outdoors experts wildcraft to provide great simple designs which will keep you comfortable and prepared for the great outdoors. Extremely lightweight, wear this when you have to brave dropping temperatures. Product Details Black jacket, has a mock collar, full zippered closure in front, long sleeves with velcro fasteners at the cuffs, branding at the back yoke and left chest and two insert pockets on the sides in front above the hemline Material and Care Synthetic Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size SPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
